title: malaisia scandens subsp. scandens
intro: Malaisia scandens subsp. scandens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the mountain gardenia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Malaisia scandens subsp. scandens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a potential natural remedy for various ailments. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction to be consumed orally, or as a topical application to accelerate wound healing.
